calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Gerald F. Woods, Esq. for Petitioner: Sean McKenna, present as Guardian at litem for and with David McKenna, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $605.14
A net balance of $7,500.00 to be depositted into a blocked account with Bank of America, San Bruno, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
